input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.9.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.9.4.2
            TITLE: ready to drive must not be possible until the three at the same time:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.9.4.2: Ready to Drive must not be possible until the three at the same time:
EV.9.4.2 Ready to Drive must not be possible until the three at the same time: 
• Tractive System Active  EV.9.3 
• The Brake Pedal is pressed and held to engage the mechanical brakes  T.3.2 
• The driver performs a manual action to initiate Ready to Drive  
Such as pressing a specific button in the cockpit

final_answer:
rule EV.9.4.2: Ready to Drive must not be possible until the three at the same time:
EV.9.4.2 Ready to Drive must not be possible until the three at the same time:
• Tractive System Active EV.9.3
• The Brake Pedal is pressed and held to engage the mechanical brakes T.3.2
• The driver performs a manual action to initiate Ready to Drive Such as pressing a specific button in the cockpit
